name: Auto Push to GitHub on Save
description: Whenever a source file is saved in Kiro, auto-commit and push to GitHub main. GitHub Actions then builds and deploys to Cloudflare Pages (insightpulse.pages.dev) automatically.

then.prompt:
A source file was just saved in the InsightPulse project. Run these steps using the execute_pwsh tool:

Step 1 — Stage all changes:
git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" add -A

Step 2 — Check if there are staged changes:
git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" diff --cached --quiet

Step 3 — If there ARE staged changes (exit code non-zero), commit and push:
git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" commit -m "auto: sync from Kiro IDE"
git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" push origin main

After a successful push, inform the user: 'Pushed to GitHub. GitHub Actions is now building and deploying to https://insightpulse.pages.dev via Cloudflare Pages (~60 seconds).'

If no changes exist, do nothing silently.
